race.comment: The scratching of HOLLYWOOD STRIP has thrown this race wide open and BROOKLYN DAN (1) could be the main beneficiary. He is part of a very small club to have beaten HOLLYWOOD STRIP, that coming when he won the Gold Chalice back in March. He led from a few spots wider when winning his lead-up at this circuit and distance last week so has the pace to take advantage of the inside draw. That should give him every chance. SOHO CHARMER (13) cops a tricky draw but he is progressive and in form having recorded close seconds in both outings since a fresh win at Menangle. Hit the line hard from this row last time so look for him late. YOTTIE (10) has been close-up in each outing this time in, beaten 2.7m from this row last start. Peaking now and with luck could be dangerous. PALLADIUM NZ (4) has performed well from tougher draws at his last couple. The scratchings bring him closer to the pegs so should get his chance. REWATCH (8) draws to track BROOKLYN DAN after a second to him last week. Each way.
